title: taraxacum pseudonigricans
intro: Taraxacum pseudonigricans, also known as the lesser horse daisy, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum pseudonigricans is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed raw or added to salads.
